name: Workflow request
about: Suggest a new Codex/OpenClaw workflow template
title: "[Workflow]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow Idea

Describe the workflow you want to add.

## Use Case

Who would use this workflow, and why?

## Inputs

What information should the workflow receive?

Examples:

- Issue text
- Pull request diff
- Documentation files
- Release notes
- OCR output

## Expected Output

What should the workflow produce?

Examples:

- Summary
- Checklist
- Draft response
- Refactored document
- Review comments

## Constraints

List any important constraints, risks, or safety concerns.

## Additional Notes

Add examples, references, or related workflows.
